title: [CI:DOCS] Add docs of changing default netavark networks
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

comments.body: I added a signed-off and rebased.  I am pretty sure a second look at the wording would be good though.
you have whitespace issues.  please resolve and repush.

I'll never use the github editor again.  It seemed a good idea at that time...

Fixed the trailing whitespace.
